strategy: Expect a long grind: 23,600 health, 40% pierce, and heavy self-blading. Win through damage, not healing.
Round 1 he drops Doom and Gloom -75%, so your heals barely work. Do not waste turns replacing it; he just recasts it.
Hit with Ice or Life (+30% incoming); avoid Death (80% resist).
Every attack you land gives you an Infection that cuts healing further. Carry Cleanse Charm or plan to burst without relying on heals.
Every second round he self-casts Dark Pact, Deathblade, and Balanceblade. Strip the charms or out-pace the stack.
Every third round he casts Call of Khrulhu. Shield for the incoming Death hit, then commit to one big trap-and-Feint burst.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he casts Doom and Gloom -75%, so healing barely works. Win with damage instead.
